subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Muhammad, upon him be the Glory of God, is present and requesteth the penning of this epistle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی جناب آقا سید محمد علیه بهاء الله حاضر و خواهش نگارش این ورقه
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
